# akp_kargo_default_shard_agent (Data Source)

Gets information about the default shard agent for a Kargo instance



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `kargo_instance_id` (String) The ID of the Kargo instance

### Read-Only

- `agent_id` (String) The ID of the Kargo agent set as the default shard agent
- `id` (String) Resource ID (same as kargo_instance_id)
